summary: Bug Fix Verification Complete: Professional Application Form - All features working correctly. Email field 'Adresse courriel' now displays in Step 1, multi-step form navigation works, form submission succeeds, and applications appear in admin panel.

integration_issues.issue: Minor: Email field shows 'EMPTY' initially instead of user's email pre-populated. The field exists and form works, but UX could be improved by pre-filling from user session.

critical_code_review_comments: Email field is correctly displayed in Step 1 with label 'Adresse courriel *'
handleSubmit function at lines 98-160 works correctly - navigates to home on success
Backend POST /api/pro/apply correctly receives and stores application data
Admin panel correctly shows pending applications in 'Pro' tab

admin_panel.application_details: PASSED - Shows name, email, expertise, experience, country

seed_data_creation: Created test user 'fulltest_25014@test.com' with pro application during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for professional registration form is verified. All 4 steps of the form work correctly. Email field 'Adresse courriel' is now visible in Step 1. Form submission via handleSubmit works and creates pending application in database. Admin can view applications in 'Pro' tab of admin panel. The only minor observation is that the email field doesn't pre-populate with the user's email (shows placeholder instead), but this doesn't block functionality.
